posts.author: AustinM (Austin Maurer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello hello…

So I work in a company where we have about 30 statuses for tasks - half positive and half negative. For the negative ones we have our reps readdress the task after 30 days. It would be amazing to group the negative status tasks with the same notification rather than to create an automation for each task for notifications.
